selection_policy.main_rule: Use the completed or latest usable rollout for each listed model/framework pair. Six models have three framework runs; GPT-5.5 has one react run. The non-LLM heuristic baseline uses the latest dated hard_v2 180-day run available in temp/. Best-run selection is survival-first: maximize run_days, then final_networth, then total_sales.
selection_policy.storage_rule: raw_runs contains symlinks to original logs because the raw logs are large and live on /Volumes/Data or temp/.

runs.notes: Manual quality-based heuristic policy on hard_v2 for 180 days; tuned to sample_size=2 and bulk_qty_multiplier=6 from the 2026-05-24 SKU2 parameter search; approximate oracle-style reference, not a fair LLM-agent baseline.
